data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The expected result for the exploratory step requires confirmation of the scenario behavior or a clear failure report. However, the evidence provided does not include any outcomes from the simulation of the payment scenario, specifically regarding the refund to an expired card. Without this critical information, it is impossible to determine if the requirement has been met.
gaps: No evidence of the outcome of the payment scenario simulation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
